chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-971 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.10.2024 Applicants present on bail. Mr. Abdul Majeed Magsi, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Jehanzaib @ Jansher Memon, Advocate has placed Vakalatnama on behalf of complainant. Mr. Shewak Rathore, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh along-with ASI Bashir Ahmed PS Tando Muhammad Khan. == Applicants Ali Ahmed and others seek pre-arrest bail in FIR No.247 of 2024 registered under sections 436, 506/2, 504, 147, 148, 149, 114 and 427 P.P.C at PS Tando Muhammad Khan after their earlier bail for same relief was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-I Tando Muhammad Khan vide impugned order dated 30.08.2024, hence this bail application. The facts relating to bail application in hand are already mentioned in FIR as well as memo, therefore, there is no need to reproduce the same. Both the parties and their counsels submit in FIR No.227 of 2024 they have patched-up outside the Court and this FIR also recommended to be disposed of under “C” Class; however, no final order has yet been passed by the learned Magistrate. DPG submits that since the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court, as such, he has no objection if interim bail earlier granted to the applicants be confirmed. In view of no objection of complainant coupled with the fact that FIR in hand has been recommended to be disposed under “C” Class even learned DPG conceded for confirmation of bail, result thereof, the applicants have made out their case as one of further inquiry, therefore, the bail application is allowed.

DPG submits that since the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court, as such, he has no objection if interim bail earlier granted to the applicants be confirmed. In view of no objection of complainant coupled with the fact that FIR in hand has been recommended to be disposed under “C” Class even learned DPG conceded for confirmation of bail, result thereof, the applicants have made out their case as one of further inquiry, therefore, the bail application is allowed. Consequently, pre- arrest bail already granted to the applicants vide order dated 03.09.2024 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Needless to mention that above observations are tentative in nature only to decide instant bail application and same would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
